    Enum CadPolylineFlag

    The Cad POLYLINE flags.

    Namespace: Aspose.CAD.FileFormats.Cad.CadConsts
    Assembly: Aspose.CAD.dll
    Syntax
    [Flags]
[ComVisible(false)]
public enum CadPolylineFlag : short

    CLOSED_POLY

    The close d_ poly.

    CLOSED_POLY_MESH

    The close d_ pol y_ mesh.

    CURVE_FIT

    The curv e_ fit.

    GENERATED_PATTERN

    The generate d_ pattern.

    NONE

    The none flags.

    POLYFACE_MESH

    The polyfac e_ mesh.

    POLYMESH_3D

    The polymes h_3 d.

    POLY_3D

    The pol y_3 d.

    SPLINE_FIT

    The splin e_ fit.
